title: Weapons O' Plenty
description: A simple mod that adds a few weapons like cool swords and blasters.
body:
This amazing and spectacular weapons mod adds just a few nice items to the game, I plan to keep adding more to keep adding more fun.

# Melee:

### Iron Longsword:
A basic sword a bit stronger than iron.

### Emerald sword:
Emerald sword. nothing special.

### Shadow Blade:
An epic purple sword that can shoot enderpearls.

### Echo Blade:
A sword that hits thrice!(hits the mob twice more after the original hit).

### Stormbolt:
smites the attacked mob.

### BattleAxe Os:
A big axe for hitting things.

### Gravity Hammer:
A slow weapon that deals a lot of damage and when right clicked on a block, causing surrounding entities to levitate.

### Soul scythe:
A sythe that has a chance to instantly kill a mob and harvest it's soul.

### Mancathcer:
Slows hit mobs.

# Ranged:

### pistol:
Fires very quick bullets(uses iron nuggets).

### Shrapnel Cannon:
Fires 9 iron nuggets that aren't very accurate but do a decent amount of damage(Uses iron ingots).

### Plasma Cannon:
Fires a slow moving projectile that isn't affected by gravity that explodes in contact with blocks but not mobs(uses redstone blocks).

### Spear:
Basically, a craftable trident that is able to stack(to 64) but isn't used for close range.
